cart.itemSentToKitchen: Item already sent to kitchen. Ask kitchen to cancel, or void from the order.

tables.emptyFloors: No floors created yet. Add a floor to get started.
tables.noTablesOnFloor: No tables created yet. Add a table to get started.
tables.floorNamePlaceholder: e.g. Ground Floor, Terrace, First Floor
tables.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this table? This cannot be undone.
tables.deleteFloorMessage: Are you sure? All tables on this floor will also be deleted.
tables.cannotDeleteFloorWithTables: Cannot delete a floor that has tables. Remove all tables first.

kitchen.title: Kitchen Display
kitchen.noActiveOrdersDesc: New KOTs will appear here automatically

waiter.pickTableHint: Pick a table, then start adding items.
waiter.checkSettingsHint: Check that Waiter Network is enabled in Settings on the billing PC.
waiter.tableLockedByOtherWaiter: This table is being handled by another waiter
waiter.yourTableTooltip: Your table — tap to add more
waiter.taxComputedNote: Tax + total are calculated on the billing PC.

staff.title: Staff Management
staff.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this staff member? This cannot be undone.
staff.name: Name
staff.selectRoleToEdit: Select a role to edit permissions
staff.noAttendanceRecords: No attendance records for this date

inventory.name: Name
inventory.receiveInstructions: Enter the quantity received for each item. Stock will be updated automatically.

reports.noBusyHoursData: No data for the selected period
reports.busyHoursLocalNote: Times shown in your local timezone. Cancelled orders are excluded.
reports.noSalesData: No sales data for selected period
reports.coinsRedeemedBillDesc: Bill amount covered by coin redemptions (not actual money received)
reports.noCashFlowData: No cash flow data for selected period
reports.noOrdersMatch: No orders match the current filters
reports.noTableOrders: No table orders found for this period
reports.deletePasswordPrompt: Enter password to confirm deletion. This cannot be undone.

menu.noAddonGroupsYet: No addon groups created yet. Go to the Addons tab to create groups first.
menu.selectAddonGroupsHint: Select which addon groups should be available for this item.
menu.importFailed: Failed to import menu data. Please check the file format.

settings.title: Settings
settings.systemUpdateDesc: Check and install updates to keep the system up to date.
settings.updateReadyDesc: Restart the application to apply the update.
settings.upToDate: Your system is up to date.
settings.devModeNoUpdate: Updates are disabled in development mode.
settings.waiterNetworkDesc: Allow waiters to take orders from a tablet or phone on your local network. Orders sent from the tablet appear instantly in the billing screen, and KOTs are auto-printed in the kitchen.
settings.waiterNetworkUrl: Open this URL on the waiter tablet
settings.networkSharedPort: Uses the same port as the Kitchen Network. Configure the port from Kitchen Network settings.
settings.kitchenNetworkDesc: Allow tablets or other devices on your local network to open the Kitchen Display in a browser. Useful when your kitchen is on a different machine than the billing PC.
settings.kitchenNetworkPortHint: Default 3030. Make sure the port is open in your firewall.
settings.kitchenNetworkUrl: Open this URL on the kitchen tablet
settings.kitchenNetworkQrLabel: Or scan this QR code with the tablet
settings.kitchenNetworkTokenHint: Anyone with the token can open the kitchen display. Regenerating invalidates the old URL.
settings.kitchenNetworkNoLan: Could not detect a LAN IP address. Make sure this PC is connected to your local network (WiFi or Ethernet).
settings.networkNoAuthWarning: No password is required to open this URL. Anyone on your local network can use it. Make sure your staff WiFi is separate from any guest network.
settings.coinRewardsDesc: Reward customers with coins on every bill. 1 coin = {{currency}}1. Customers can redeem coins on their next visit.
settings.enableCoinRewardsDesc: Award coins to customers after payment
settings.coinSlabsDesc: Define how many coins are earned based on bill amount
settings.coinSlabHint: Highest matching slab is applied. E.g. a bill of {{currency}}{{amount}} earns {{coins}} coins.
settings.whatsappDesc: Send bill image to customers via WhatsApp after payment.
settings.whatsappEnabledDesc: Allow sending bill image to customer's WhatsApp during payment.
settings.chatmitraApiKeyHint: Enter the API key for WhatsApp integration
settings.whatsappDisabledNotice: WhatsApp bill sending is turned off in this version. These options are shown for reference only.

language.title: Region & language
language.description: Choose your country first. Amounts use that region's currency symbol (values stay in INR in the database). If your country has more than one language, pick the app language below.
language.countrySubtitle: Currency follows your country. Select where you operate.
language.languageSubtitle: Shown when your country offers more than one language.

footnotes.in: India: common GST slabs for food service include 5%, 12%, 18%, and 28% depending on outlet type and items. Confirm what applies to your business.
footnotes.cn: China: catering and similar services are often subject to 6% VAT; some goods use 9% or 13%. Rates are simplified references—verify with a qualified advisor.
footnotes.jp: Japan: dine-in sales are commonly 10% consumption tax; takeout food may qualify for 8%. Alcohol is usually 10%.
footnotes.es: Spain: restaurant meals often use 10% IVA; some foods 4% and the general rate 21%.
footnotes.fr: France: on-premises food service often uses 10% TVA; other rates include 5.5% and 20%.
footnotes.gcc: Gulf Cooperation Council countries use different VAT rates (for example UAE 5%, Saudi Arabia 15%). Choose the rate that matches your location.

login.pinMinDigits: PIN must be at least {{min}} digits
login.lockoutTryAgain: Too many failed attempts. Try again in {{seconds}}s.

activate.title: Activate License
activate.subtitleNew: Enter the license key provided by your vendor to unlock the app.
activate.subtitleExpired: Your license has expired. Enter a new key to continue.
activate.footerHint: Contact your vendor if you haven't received a license key.
activate.errorIncompleteKey: Please enter a complete 15-character license key
activate.errorInvalid: Invalid license key. Please try again.
activate.errorExpired: This license key has expired. Please contact your vendor for a renewal.
activate.errorDuplicate: This key is already activated on another device.
activate.errorSignature: The key you entered is not valid. Please check for typos.
activate.errorNetwork: Could not reach the activation server. Please try again later.

paymentModal.title: Payment
paymentModal.refErrorCard: Please enter the last 4 digits of the card
paymentModal.refErrorUpi: Please enter the UPI transaction ID
paymentModal.coinsEarnPreview: Customer will earn {{count}} coins on this bill

discountModal.title: Apply Discount
discountModal.reasonRequired: Please provide a reason for the discount
discountModal.toastSaveFailed: Could not save discount to the order
discountModal.toastRemoveFailed: Could not remove discount from the order

licenseBanner.grace: License expired. {{count}} day remaining in grace period. Contact your vendor to renew.
licenseBanner.grace_plural: License expired. {{count}} days remaining in grace period. Contact your vendor to renew.
licenseBanner.expiringSoon: License expires in {{count}} day ({{date}}). Contact your vendor to renew.
licenseBanner.expiringSoon_plural: License expires in {{count}} days ({{date}}). Contact your vendor to renew.

toast.offersUnavailable: Offers feature not available. Please restart the app.
toast.kotSentPrinterWarn: KOT sent to kitchen. Printer not available.
toast.noKotForOrder: No KOT found for this order
toast.whatsappBillFailed: Failed to send bill via WhatsApp

settingsPage.resetDatabaseDesc: Delete all data and restart with a fresh database. This cannot be undone.
settingsPage.archiveOldOrdersDesc: Export completed orders older than 2 years to a JSON file, then permanently delete them from the database. Frees disk space and keeps reports fast. Active and held orders are never deleted.
settingsPage.archiveNoOrders: No orders older than 2 years to archive.
settingsPage.archiveSavedOnly: Saved {{count}} order(s) to {{path}}. Deletion was cancelled.
settingsPage.archiveDone: Archived {{archived}} order(s) to {{path}} and deleted {{deleted}} from the database.
settingsPage.discardRestaurantConfirm: You have unsaved changes to the restaurant profile. Discard them?
settingsPage.restaurantProfileDesc: Manage your restaurant details that appear on bills and reports.
settingsPage.logoHint: PNG, JPG or SVG. Shown on printed bills.
settingsPage.printModeThermalDesc: Raw commands to printer. Falls back to HTML on failure.
settingsPage.printerNotFoundWarn: Saved printer "{{name}}" not found. Click Refresh or select another.
settingsPage.kotCountModeDesc: Controls the counter shown on printed KOT receipts.
settingsPage.autoPrintBillDesc: Automatically print bill when payment is completed
settingsPage.centerBillPrintDesc: Center the receipt horizontally when printing. Turn off to print from the left.

receiptFields.title: Receipt Fields
receiptFields.hint: Show, hide, drag to reorder, and rename fields on your receipts.

settingsPage.roundOffDesc: Round bill total to nearest rupee
settingsPage.offersDesc: Discounts are applied automatically in the cart when order total meets the condition.
settingsPage.backupRestoreDesc: Manage database backups to keep your data safe.
settingsPage.manualBackupDesc: Creates a copy of your entire database. Choose where to save it.
settingsPage.restoreSectionDesc: Replaces all current data with a backup file. The app will restart automatically.
settingsPage.gdriveDesc: Backups are automatically uploaded to your Google Drive when signed in.
settingsPage.gdriveNoBackups: No backups found on Google Drive
settingsPage.gdriveRestoreConfirmDesc: This will replace all current data with the selected backup and restart the app.
settingsPage.daySessionDesc: Manage daily opening and closing of your business.
settingsPage.licenseDesc: Your software license details and validity.
settingsPage.licRenewSoon: Expires in {{count}} day. Please renew soon.
settingsPage.licRenewSoon_plural: Expires in {{count}} days. Please renew soon.
settingsPage.licGraceWarn: {{count}} grace day left. Renew immediately to avoid lockout.
settingsPage.licGraceWarn_plural: {{count}} grace days left. Renew immediately to avoid lockout.
settingsPage.licContactVendor: Contact your vendor to obtain a valid license key.
settingsPage.licRenewHelp1: To renew or upgrade your license, contact your vendor and provide your new license key.
settingsPage.licRenewHelp2: You can enter a new key on the activation screen (accessible after logout).
settingsPage.showPricesDesc: Display item prices on the billing menu grid
settingsPage.clearLicenseConfirm: Clear all license data? You will need to re-activate.

billingPage.cannotSplitAll: Cannot split all items — leave at least one
billingPage.onlyFreeTablesEditable: Only free tables can be edited or deleted
billingPage.forceDeleteTableWarning: Force delete will remove this table. Past orders keep the table name as a snapshot but lose the link.
billingPage.forceDeleteFloorWarning1: Force delete will remove this floor
billingPage.forceDeleteFloorWarning2: . Past orders keep table-name snapshots but lose their links.
billingPage.chooseItemsToMove: Choose items to move to another table
billingPage.itemsWillMove: {{count}} items will move to this table
billingPage.unsavedItemsWarning: You have {{count}} item(s) in the cart that haven't been sent to KOT. Switching tables will discard them.

menuEdit.deleteItemConfirm: Delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
menuEdit.forceDeleteItemWarning: Force delete will remove the item permanently. Past orders keep their item snapshots (name, price) but lose the link to this item.
menuEdit.deleteCategoryConfirm: Delete {{name}}? Items in it must be moved or deleted first.
menuEdit.forceDeleteCategoryWarning: Force delete will permanently remove this category and all its items. Past orders keep their item snapshots but lose their links to these items.

menuMgmt.cannotDeleteCategory: Cannot delete "{{name}}" - it has {{count}} item(s). Move or delete them first.
menuMgmt.pricePerVariation: Price per variation (leave empty to use base price)
menuMgmt.kitchenStationHint: KOTs are grouped by station so each kitchen section only sees its own items.
menuMgmt.deleteItemConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
menuMgmt.forceDeleteWarning: Force delete will remove the item permanently. Past orders keep their item snapshots (name, price) but lose the link to this item.
